blocks.body: Future Simple: Negatives — will not / won't + V1 for negative future statements.

{"level":"A1–A2","intro":"In negative Future Simple sentences, use will not or won't + V1.","rules":[{"label":"will not / won't","color":"emerald","text":"The full and short forms have the same meaning.","example":"I will not wait. / I won't wait."},{"label":"V1 after won't","color":"blue","text":"Use the base verb without to.","example":"She won't be late. / They won't come."},{"label":"Same for all subjects","color":"amber","text":"Won't does not change with the subject.","example":"He won't call. / We won't call."}]}

{"title":"1. Basic patterns","intro":"Always use V1 after will not / won't.","items":[{"label":"Full form","title":"will not + V1","subtitle":"I will not forget. / She will not agree."},{"label":"Short form","title":"won't + V1","subtitle":"We won't be late. / They won't stay."},{"label":"Verb be","title":"won't be","subtitle":"It won't be difficult."},{"label":"Contrast","title":"will come → won't come","subtitle":"The main verb remains unchanged."}]}

{"title":"2. Affirmative and negative","intro":"Compare the two patterns.","rows":[{"en":"I will call tomorrow.","ua":"I won't call tomorrow.","note":"will → won't"},{"en":"She will be late.","ua":"She won't be late.","note":"won't be"},{"en":"They will come with us.","ua":"They won't come with us.","note":"same V1"}],"warning":"Do not say will don't, won't to go, or won't goes."}

{"title":"3. Common mistakes","items":[{"label":"Mistake 1","color":"rose","title":"Using don't after will.","wrong":"❌ I will don't go.","right":"✅ I won't go."},{"label":"Mistake 2","color":"amber","title":"Adding to after won't.","wrong":"❌ She won't to come.","right":"✅ She won't come."},{"label":"Mistake 3","color":"sky","title":"Changing the main verb.","wrong":"❌ He won't works.","right":"✅ He won't work."}]}
{"title":"4. Short summary","items":["Negative = subject + will not / won't + V1.","Won't is the same for every subject.","Do not use to or change the verb after won't.","With be, use won't be."]}

{"title":"5. Practice","select_title":"Exercise 1. Choose the correct negative","select_intro":"Choose the correct Future Simple form.","selects":[{"label":"a) He won't come. / b) He won't comes.","prompt":"Which option is correct?","answer":"a"},{"label":"a) We will don't wait. / b) We won't wait.","prompt":"Which option is correct?","answer":"b"}],"options":["a","b"],"input_title":"Exercise 2. Make it negative","input_intro":"Rewrite with won't.","inputs":[{"before":"She will be late.","after":"→","answer":"She won't be late."},{"before":"They will stay here.","after":"→","answer":"They won't stay here."}]}
